title: Add an ownership check inside a single handle_event
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/note_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.NoteLive) that has a handle_event("delete", %{"id" => id}, socket) which looks up the note via MyApp.Notes.get_note!/1 and only deletes it if note.user_id == socket.assigns.current_user.id. On mismatch, return {:noreply, put_flash(socket, :error, "Not authorized")}. mount/3 returns {:ok, assign(socket, :current_user, %{id: 1})}.
tier_rationale: Canonical server-side auth check in a single event. Iron law application.
research_citation: oliver-kriska/claude-elixir-phoenix iron law: 'Authorize in every LiveView handle_event'
